event: System froze (display/mouse/keyboard); preserved state via remote control before restart
detail: HEAD=origin/main synced. Committed pending RESULTS.md clean rewrite. Wrote RESTART_HANDOFF.md with 4 OPEN ITEMS for resume: (1) Kintsugi turn OFF auto-scale - smaller fragments get scaled + stack instead of matching at crack interface; keep network poses, only one uniform group transform if any; (2) validate 14_kintsugi_result.png on GitHub shows real reassembly not stacked; (3) 2D packing - are PNG overlaps stale images or real algorithm overlap (FreeNestX verified 0.0 live; recheck); (4) 2D boundary containment. Live Rhino MCP was BLOCKED (spawn_slot startup_timeout, Rhino no main window, likely license/update dialog); on restart launch Rhino manually + MCPStart to re-adopt. Self-scaling .gha deployed + bundled. All pushed to GitHub main.

event: Resumed after restart; fixed 2D render + Kintsugi display per user feedback
detail: 2D: re-measured FreeNestX live = 18/18, total overlap 0.0, boundary spill 0.0 -> ALGORITHM CLEAN; the old PNG overlaps were a translucent flat-tile render artifact. Re-rendered opaque (30mm extruded tiles) so it reads unambiguously. KINTSUGI: turned OFF auto-scale (natural network scale, base z=0); root cause of 'stacked' look was Mesh Style 1 convex hulls interpenetrating at the concave fracture. Switched to point-cloud display (Load BB Fragment Points, gold neck + blue body) which honestly shows the 2 fragments MEETING at the crack; re-ran Port mode (Mesh Style 3, 2/2 placed, verifier 0.707 STRONG). Updated 14_kintsugi .gh/.3dm/.png/README + galleries. All committed + pushed.

event: Researched + planned statue->brick-blocks factory workflow; in-process confirmed too laggy -> out-of-process harness path specced
detail: 4-agent research done (component inventory). Decisions: aligned grid first (staggered variant later), in-process+interior-skip+batches, BOTH branches (gangsaw pack + ETH1100 rubble match). Real-face engine = Quarry Decompose By Mesh (CGAL) box-grid INTERSECT solid (boundary=real faces, interior=cubes), CgalConvert.ToSnapshot/FromSnapshot + CgalMeshBoolean.Intersection (CgalCutComponents.cs:363-417). IN-PROCESS via live Rhino MCP TIMED OUT at 300s on the full 70k bun_zipper.ply import+FillHoles and HUNG the slot. PIVOT: build harness --statueblocks mode (Rhino.Inside out-of-process) on res2 bunny (8171v/16301f); native DLLs (frahan_cgal/geogram/gmp) beside harness exe; writes 15_blocks.3dm + metrics; live Rhino only for PNG captures after restart. Full spec in examples/15_statue_to_blocks/PLAN.md. NEXT: user restart Rhino+MCPStart (recover hung slot for captures/in-process compare); build+run harness mode.

event: Factory workflow built + verified LIVE (decompose + Branch A + Branch B)
detail: FIX: Geogram FillHoles->RemeshUniform(5000)->FillHoles makes raw scan a clean 2-manifold (closed+manifold) so Mesh.IsPointInside + CGAL corefinement work; welded 8-vert cutter box mandatory (Rhino CreateFromBox is unwelded 24-vert -> CGAL rc-12). Decompose: 0.5m grid 6x6x5, interior-skip, 173 booleans 0-fail 3.6s in-process -> 113 closed blocks (7 cubes+106 real-face boundary), recovery 1.0000 (VolumeMassProperties not hand signed-tetra). Branch A: gangsaw as-carved yield 24% (statue 5.40/envelope 22.5 m3); Block Pack Tree re-nest 83/100 at 100 elts (tuned <50, Kim 2025). Branch B: ETH1100 rubble match (Block Pair Match 3D skeleton -> AABB-containment proxy), natural 30.3%/21.5m3 vs scaled-to-avg-block x0.7355 58.8%/8.9m3, both kept (user request). Commits 9b1e71e/43c0827/2539cad. PUSH PENDING (git push main blocked, needs user approval).
